parameters: Whoah! These directors are super realistic!
Who's sandwich would you like to steal today?
It’s labeled “DO NOT STEAL” are you sure?
A crime with leftovers.. not too smart are you?
Sandwich stealing is wrong, are you sure?
The cheese screams as you bite into it.
The remaining half sits in the fridge. Alone. Abandoned.
When the sandwiches owner returns, instead of pitying the
remaining sandwich, he'll look at the remnants in disgust.
You realise it's not a sandwich at all, but a
morality test. Do you still want to eat it?
You put the moral test back in the fridge,
You eat the sides of the sandwich,
